channel.title: Weekly Previews
channel.description: Weekly pull list of new releases with thumbnails and links to full-size cover images.

item.title: ABSOLUTE FLASH #17 CVR A NICK ROBLES
item.dc:creator: Weekly Previews
item.description: ABSOLUTE FLASH #17 CVR A NICK ROBLES is part of this week's pull list. This release is now available and featured in the Weekly Previews. Click the cover image above to view the full-size image from the publisher. This item was included in the weekly shipment and is ready for pickup or delivery.
